S.comment: loop full measure value (=1 when you have partial)

T.comment: loop partial measure (1,2,3,or 5 for sub measure parts)

S.comment: loop full measure value (=1 when you have partial)

T.comment: loop partial measure (1,2,3,or 5 for sub measure parts)

S.comment: loop full measure value (=1 when you have partial)

T.comment: loop partial measure (1,2,3,or 5 for sub measure parts)

S.comment: loop full measure value (=1 when you have partial)

T.comment: loop partial measure (1,2,3,or 5 for sub measure parts)

S.comment: loop full measure value (=1 when you have partial)

T.comment: loop partial measure (1,2,3,or 5 for sub measure parts)

B.comment: needs to show valid min max (else hidden)

C.comment: max value needs to = zero when A=0, else should be the max of the lookup provided

B.comment: needs to show valid min max (else hidden)

C.comment: max value needs to = zero when A=0, else should be the max of the lookup provided
